MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF BRADSHAW & ASSOCIATES, P.C.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT ASHLEY O'NEILL.
APPEARANCES: Kristen M. Ross, Esq. of Bradshaw & Associates, P.C. 433-4800 for pltf & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - granted. No opposition filed. Order & judgment signed in open court. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2008 Continued To Oct-29-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2008 Continued To Sep-10-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Establish Admissions, Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Demands For Production Of Documents And For Award Of Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Kristen M. Ross, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Bradshaw & Associates, P.C.
Ashley R. O'Neill, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Todd Gardner

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Bradshaw & Associates, P. C.'s motion to deem certain matters admitted and to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and requests for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. The matters set forth in plaintiff's first set of requests for admission are ordered admitted. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $535 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2008 Continued To Jul-30-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2008 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-30-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
